mealAnalysis.guidance_message: This pizza slice is high in carbohydrates and fats, which can cause a rapid increase in blood sugar levels. For diabetics, pizza should generally be avoided or consumed in very small portions, ideally accompanied by a salad or lean protein to slow glucose absorption. If you choose to eat pizza, opt for thin crust and extra veggies, and limit portion size.
mealAnalysis.meal_description: A slice of pizza topped with cheese, tomatoes, and assorted vegetables, on a standard crust.
